name: Gluten Free Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray an 8-inch X 4-inch loaf pan with non-stick coating. Coat the inside with cornmeal and set aside.
2. In a small bowl, dissolve the sugar in warm water. Sprinkle yeast over top and set aside to proof.
3. Stir well.
4. In a saucepan, combine 1 cup water and tapioca. Bring to a boil and cook for 1 to 2 minutes, until thickened and clear.
5. In a mixing bowl, stir together the whole bean flour, cornmeal, cornstarch, baking powder, and salt. Whisk together the tapioca and raised yeast.
6. Stir into the dry ingredients. Beat until smooth and set aside for 10 minutes.
7. Knead until soft and turn into the prepared loaf pan. Sprinkle with poppy seeds.
8. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes or until the loaf tests done.
